# Kaushal Shah - Senior Software Developer & Architect

Kaushal Shah is a Senior Software Developer & Full-Stack Architect based in Pune, India, with over 4.5 years of professional experience building high-throughput backend APIs, multi-tenant SaaS platforms, and modern web applications.

## Technical Expertise

- **Backend & APIs**: .NET 9, ASP.NET Core, Node.js, Express, REST APIs, Entity Framework Core, Repository Patterns, Dependency Injection
- **Frontend**: Angular 19/19 (TypeScript), React, Vue.js, TailwindCSS, SCSS, Responsive UI/UX Design, State Management (RxJS)
- **Databases**: SQL Server, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS (VPC, VPS hosting, EC2), Cloudflare (Caching, Browser Insights, Security), CI/CD Pipelines, Docker
- **Advanced Workflows**: Agentic AI, LLM Integration, Secure Voting Protocols, Multi-tenant SaaS Architectures

## Key Projects

### 1. Sparqal Orbit
A multi-tenant marketing automation SaaS platform designed for Instagram DM response workflows, multi-agent AI copy drafting, and automated content scheduling.
- **Tech Stack**: Angular 19, Node.js, OpenAI API, AWS VPC, MongoDB.

### 2. V&S Apparel
An enterprise ERP and inventory management platform for apparel manufacturers with automated invoicing, order tracking, and production pipeline management.
- **Tech Stack**: .NET 9, Angular 19, SQL Server, Entity Framework.

### 3. Payment Approval System
A secure, multi-level payment authorization portal with role-based access control, cryptographic verification, and audit logs.
- **Tech Stack**: .NET Core, SQL Server, REST API.

### 4. Speech Middleware
An integration engine translating voice commands and speech patterns into backend actions, utilizing WebSocket communication and cloud voice APIs.
- **Tech Stack**: Node.js, WebSockets, REST APIs.

### 5. Secure Voting System (Case Study)
A tamper-proof voting system hosting concurrent mock elections with absolute vote verification, zero downtime, and complete cryptographic security.
- **Tech Stack**: Angular, Node.js, AWS VPS.
